rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 score and surface the same substantive concerns (missing Nest.js/Vitest, no explicit Kotlin/Python, bandwidth questions from the concurrent Founder role). The wording differs but the reasoning, strengths, and weaknesses map one-to-one onto the baseline. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or anything tied to the Berlin-to-Bangalore change; the differences are ordinary run-to-run rephrasing.
